game_info.title: Pogo Punk 3D
game_info.concept:
Join the pogo gang!

App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/gopogo/id1030322270

================================================================================
Full Description:
================================================================================

Join the pogo gang!
In a grim sci-fi future where pogoing is outlawed, this gang of misfits breaks all the rules.

Pogo over the police and their dogs, avoid hazards, and make it to the top!
And once you complete the final level, try to reach a highscore in the Endless mode. 


Features:
- Casual one-handed gameplay, no virtual buttons here!
- Adjust your angle to pogo around
- 2 gameplay modes: 40 hand-made Levels and Endless Mode to keep you pogoing
- Dozens of characters to unlock
- Sharp pixel art graphics
- Groovy music by Eirik Suhrke, composer of Downwell, Super Crate Box and Ridiculous Fishing



Important information
This game contains third party advertising which can be removed via a one time IAP. This game contains coins which can be collected within the game for free or bought with real money. This game contains cross promotion for other Nitrome games and this is not removed with the IAP for removal of ads.
game_info.description:
Welcome to **Pogo Punk 3D**!

In a dystopian future where walking is banned, you must pogo your way to freedom.
Master the physics of your pogo stick to bounce over police barricades, vicious cyber-dogs, and treacherous gaps.
Lean carefully to direct your bounces and maintain your balance—land on your head, and it's game over!

Collect batteries to keep your score high and reach the neon goal at the end of the district.
game_info.controls:
- **ENTER**: Start Game
- **Arrow Left / A**: Tilt Left (lean back/brake)
- **Arrow Right / D**: Tilt Right (lean forward/accelerate)
- **Space**: Charge Jump (hold to bounce higher)
- **ESC**: Pause / Resume
- **R**: Restart (after Game Over)

TEST_1.test_description: Verify basic physics and pogo bounce mechanics.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Start the game and perform no inputs. The player should bounce vertically in place due to the physics engine without falling through the floor or crashing immediately.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The player entity maintains a Y position > 0 for at least 100 frames, and the bounce count increments.

TEST_2.test_description: Verify movement and win condition logic.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Simulate a perfect run by artificially setting the player's position near the goal and simulating a forward tilt to trigger the win collision.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The gameState.gamePhase transitions to "GAME_OVER_WIN" within 200 frames.
TEST_2.description: Verify movement and win condition logic.

TEST_2.expected: The gameState.gamePhase transitions to "GAME_OVER_WIN" within 200 frames.

TEST_3.strategy_description: Apply extreme rotation input to the left until the player flips over and hits the ground with their head.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: The gameState.gamePhase transitions to "GAME_OVER_LOSE" when the head collider touches the ground.
